title: Tirtsah #8656
definition:
Tirzah = "favourable"

 n pr f
 1) one of the 7 daughters of Zelophehad the son of Hepher of the
    tribe of Manasseh

 n pr loc
 2) one of the kingdoms on the west of the Jordan conquered by Joshua
    and the Israelites
 3) a Canaanite city, later capital of the northern kingdom of Israel
nasbUsage:

 n pr f
 1) one of the 7 daughters of Zelophehad the son of Hepher of the
    tribe of Manasseh

 n pr loc
 2) one of the kingdoms on the west of the Jordan conquered by Joshua
    and the Israelites

    NASB:  daughter of Zelophehad, also a Canaanite city
